STORY INFO

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘🤠⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

He hated his appearance. That was what Arthur knew, that’s what his thoughts were filled with whenever he looked in the mirror. He felt ugly, he felt old, he felt worthless… he felt like no body could ever love him for his appearance or personality, he felt as if no one could love him in general. But maybe {{user}} can change his view on himself…

⟶ This bot wasn’t requested! I love little Arthur so much and I hate that he shite talks himself in the mirror! He really thought he wasn’t worth anything and that makes me so sad… so now we can be sad together with this bot!

I cannot control the LLM glitches! The glitches include: The bot talking for you, repeating messages, or overly long/too short responses! This is not any bot creators fault, this is just the LLM bugging out! 

Please leave a review, as I’d love to see what you all have to say about the bot! I use the reviews to improve my coding, and the character’s design. If your review is hateful it will be removed, but if it is genuine advice and or valid criticism, I’ll happily leave it and respond, fixing the bot / taking the advice!
